title: Installation fails on v0.1.9 with ImportError (openai dependency conflict)
body:
Hey!

It looks like there might be a dependency conflict in the latest release. A fresh install of `strix-agent==0.1.9` fails immediately on launch with an `ImportError` that seems to stem from an incompatibility between `litellm` and `openai`.

### Steps to Reproduce:

1.  Ensure a clean environment: `pipx uninstall strix-agent`
2.  Install the latest version: `pipx install strix-agent`
3.  Run the application: `strix`

### Expected Behavior:

The `strix` command should run, showing a help menu or starting an assessment.

### Actual Behavior:

The command fails with the following traceback:

```python
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/alex/.local/bin/strix", line 3, in <module>
    from strix.cli.main import main
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/strix/cli/__init__.py", line 1, in <module>
    from .main import main
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/strix/cli/main.py", line 18, in <module>
    import litellm
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/litellm/__init__.py", line 20, in <module>
    from litellm.llms.custom_httpx.http_handler import AsyncHTTPHandler, HTTPHandler
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/litellm/llms/custom_httpx/http_handler.py", line 16, in <module>
    from litellm.litellm_core_utils.logging_utils import track_llm_api_timing
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_utils.py", line 7, in <module>
    from litellm.types.utils import (
    ...<3 lines>...
    )
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/litellm/types/utils.py", line 42, in <module>
    from ..litellm_core_utils.core_helpers import map_finish_reason
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/core_helpers.py", line 8, in <module>
    from litellm.types.llms.openai import AllMessageValues
  File "/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/litellm/types/llms/openai.py", line 36, in <module>
    from openai.types.responses.response import (
    ...<6 lines>...
    )
ImportError: cannot import name 'ResponseTextConfig' from 'openai.types.responses.response' (/Users/alex/.local/pipx/venvs/strix-agent/lib/python3.13/site-packages/openai/types/responses/response.py) 
```


### Environment:
strix-agent version: 0.1.9

Python version: 3.13.5

OS: macOS

Install method: pipx

### Additional Context:
I tried manually injecting openai<1 into the pipx environment, but that led to a different ModuleNotFoundError, suggesting the dependency tree is pretty tangled. A full uninstall/reinstall cycle brings back this same ImportError.

Happy to help test a fix if needed. Thanks for the great tool! (also this could just be on my end, but was doing a clean install so not sure)

ai_judgment.response:
Yes.

This is an agent issue because it involves incompatible dependencies between LLM provider libraries (litellm and openai), which are essential for agent operation. The failure occurs during agent initialization due to these dependencies, aligning with the "Incompatible dependencies" sub-category under agent issues.
